index.title: My Skill Graph
index.subtitle: Your personal map of skills — built from what you've earned, what you can start next, and what each skill builds on.

browse.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name, description, or level…
browse.emptyBody: Skills are added by the community. Start a community group, propose a change, and get it approved to fill in the skill map.
browse.noMatches: No skills match the current filters.
browse.unlocksCount: unlocks nothing | unlocks {count} skill | unlocks {count} skills

graph.emptyBody: Finish course assessments to earn credentials; the skills you unlock will appear here.
graph.legendNodeSize: Dot size shows skill level (Remember → Create)
graph.earnedTitle: You have a verified credential for these skills
graph.vaultLocked: Unlock your account to see your skill map

credentials.emptyBody: Credentials you earn will appear here. Finish a course that can record a verified proof of completion to earn your first credential.

detail.noPrerequisites: No prerequisites — this is a starting skill.
detail.noDependents: Nothing builds on this one yet.
detail.credEmptyBody: Credentials you earn for this skill will appear here. Finish a course tagged with this skill to earn one.

bootstrap.title: Add your skills
bootstrap.intro: Upload a resume, transcript, or credential and we'll suggest skills to claim. Accredited documents count for more than a self-made resume. These are starting points — take an assessment to verify and raise them.
bootstrap.addedBody: Added {count} skill. Take an assessment to verify it and raise your confidence. | Added {count} skills. Take an assessment to verify them and raise your confidence.
bootstrap.filePlaceholder: PDF, image, or text — stored as evidence
bootstrap.textPlaceholder: Paste the document text here (required for PDFs / images)…
bootstrap.noSkillsFound: No matching skills found — try adding more detail.

visibility.title: Visibility & teaching
visibility.subtitle: Choose which earned skills are public, and mark the ones you teach.
visibility.empty: No earned skills yet — credentials you earn will appear here for you to publish.

path.empty: Nothing to learn — you've already proven everything in this goal.
